es.ubu.lsi.server

Class ChatServerImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • es.ubu.lsi.server.ChatServerImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ChatServer

    public class ChatServerImpl
extends java.lang.Object
implements ChatServer
    Chat server. Based on code available at: http://www.dreamincode.net/forums/topic/259777-a-simple-chat-program-with-clientserver-gui-optional/ Modified by Alfonso Domingo Blanco Date: 03/2026 Modified by Raúl Marticorena & Joaquín P- Seco
    Author:
    http://www.dreamincode.net, Raúl Marticorena, Joaquin P. Seco

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      private class  ChatServerImpl.ServerThreadForClient
      One instance of this thread will run for each client.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private boolean alive
      Flag will be turned of to stop the server.
      private static java.lang.String AUTHOR_NAME
      Author name for message sponsorship (requirement)
      private java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.util.Set<java.lang.String>> banLists
      Ban lists: map of blocker username -> set of blocked usernames
      private static int clientId
      Unique ID for each connection.
      private java.util.List<ChatServerImpl.ServerThreadForClient> clients
      Client list.
      private static int DEFAULT_PORT
      Default port.
      private int port
      Port number to listen for connection.
      private static java.text.SimpleDateFormat sdf
      Util class to display time.
      private java.net.ServerSocket serverSocket
      Server socket.
      private java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer> userPorts
      Map to store username -> port for connected clients.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ChatServerImpl(int port)
      Server constructor that receive the port to listen to for connection.

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void broadcast(ChatMessage message)
      Broadcasts a message to all clients.
      private ChatServerImpl.ServerThreadForClient findClientById(int id)
      Finds a client by its ID.

      Handles a ban request.
      private void handleUnban(int unbannerId, java.lang.String unbannedUsername)
      Handles an unban request.
      private boolean isBanned(java.lang.String blocker, java.lang.String blocked)
      Checks if a user has banned another user.
      static void main(java.lang.String[] args)
      Runs the server with a default port if is not specified as argument.
      void remove(int id)
      Removes a logout client.
      private void show(java.lang.String event)
      Shows an event (not a message) to the console.
      void shutdown()
      Closes server.
      void startup()
      Starts the server.

        Removes a logout client.

      • findClientById

        private ChatServerImpl.ServerThreadForClient findClientById(int id)
        Finds a client by its ID.
        Parameters:
        id - client id
        Returns:
        ServerThreadForClient or null if not found

      • isBanned

        private boolean isBanned(java.lang.String blocker,
                         java.lang.String blocked)
        Checks if a user has banned another user.
        Parameters:
        blocker - the user who might have banned someone
        blocked - the user who might be banned
        Returns:
        true if blocked, false otherwise

      • handleBan

        private void handleBan(int bannerId,
                       java.lang.String bannedUsername)
        Handles a ban request.
        Parameters:
        bannerId - id of the user who is banning
        bannedUsername - username of the user to be banned

      • handleUnban

        private void handleUnban(int unbannerId,
                         java.lang.String unbannedUsername)
        Handles an unban request.
        Parameters:
        unbannerId - id of the user who is unbanning
        unbannedUsername - username of the user to be unbanned

      • main

        public static void main(java.lang.String[] args)
        Runs the server with a default port if is not specified as argument.
        Parameters:
        args - arguments
